raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX & XXXX, I mistakenly purchased 2 items from XXXX. Upon realizing the error, I immediately contacted merchants to cancel said transactions. Despite doing so, merchants went ahead and sent out the items, but assured me that they would refund the purchases. All of my subsequent communications were ignored, including demanding a return label. Upon receipt of items, I immediately refused delivery & returned items back to sellers. I opened claims with Citi & they continue to deny my claims despite providing evidence supporting my claims.
